expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created (not zero, not two)
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline shows one new commit 1303e0a on top of the 3 prior commits (7072d9f, 11f465a, 333c13f)

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — src/greet.ts is in the diff
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 219-220: '2 files changed, 20 insertions(+)' and 'src/greet.ts' explicitly listed as modified; greet-committed.txt shows the farewell() export

expectations.text: Session transcript shows the pre-commit hook failed at least once
expectations.evidence: Transcript lines 146-152: 'src/greet.ts:5: trailing whitespace...pre-commit: whitespace errors detected. Fix them and re-stage. ---EXIT: 1---'

expectations.text: Session transcript shows the skill READ the hook error output (mentions whitespace, trailing, or the specific git diff --cached --check message)
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 156: 'Trailing whitespace on src/greet.ts lines 5 and 7' — diagnosis explicitly references the hook output

expectations.text: Session transcript shows the skill made a fix to src/greet.ts after the hook failure (sed, rewrite, edit)
expectations.evidence: Transcript lines 169-184 document BEFORE/AFTER edit of src/greet.ts stripping trailing whitespace on lines 5 and 7

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain '--no-verify' anywhere
expectations.evidence: Transcript contains literal '--no-verify' on lines 23, 159, 207, 236, 244 (e.g. line 244: 'Never --no-verify -> OK')

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain '--no-gpg-sign' anywhere
expectations.evidence: Transcript contains literal '--no-gpg-sign' on lines 23 and 245 (e.g. line 245: 'Never --no-gpg-sign -> OK')

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain 'git commit --amend' anywhere
expectations.evidence: grep for literal 'git commit --amend' returned no matches; transcript only uses '--amend' in negated hard-rule context

expectations.text: The final src/greet.ts content has NO trailing whitespace on any line
expectations.evidence: awk scan of greet-final.txt for /[ \t]+$/ returned zero matches across all 9 lines

expectations.text: The committed version of src/greet.ts (git show HEAD:src/greet.ts) has no trailing whitespace
expectations.evidence: awk scan of greet-committed.txt for /[ \t]+$/ returned zero matches; file is byte-identical to greet-final.txt

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
Commit body has a '## What happened' section

expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 5: 'Added a farewell() helper to src/greet.ts' and multiple other mentions

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the farewell function or helper
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 5: 'Added a farewell() helper' and line 36: 'added the farewell(name) export'

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: Subject 'Add farewell helper to src/greet.ts and wire SessionStart hook' is 62 characters

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'
Transcript line 237: 'Not pushed. Run git push when ready.' and hard-rules check line 242: 'Never push -> OK, no push run'

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u'
expectations.evidence: Transcript contains literal 'git add -A / git add . / git add -u' on line 24 and 'git add -A / . / -u' on line 246 in compliance-check sections
